messages.content:
You are an agent answering a question using these tools: google_search, get_stock_data, compute, get_weather.
At each step, EITHER issue exactly one more natural-language sub-query to gather missing information, OR give the final answer if you already have enough.
Respond with EXACTLY ONE of the following and nothing else:
  <sub-query>a single self-contained, single-tool question</sub-query>
  <final_answer>your concise final answer</final_answer>

Original question: Calculate the area of a rectangle with length 123.45 cm and width 67.89 cm, then convert the result to square inches to the nearest integer.

History so far:
Step 1 sub-query: compute 123.45 * 67.89
  Tool: compute
  Result: {"query": "123.45 * 67.89", "result": "8381.0205", "details": {"Input interpretation": "123.45\u00d767.89", "Result": "8381.0205", "Rational form": "16762041/2000 = 8381 + 41/2000", "Number name": "eight thousand three hundred eighty-one point zero two zero five", "Number line": null}}
Step 2 sub-query: compute 8381.0205 square centimeters to square inches
  Tool: compute
  Result: {"query": "8381.0205 square centimeters to square inches", "result": "1299.0608 in^2 (square inches)", "details": {"Input interpretation": "convert 8381.0205 cm^2 (square centimeters) to square inches", "Result": "1299.0608 in^2 (square inches)", "Additional conversions": "1.0023617 yd^2 (square yards)", "Comparisons as area": "\u2248 (0.2 to 0.4) \u00d7 area of a typical office desk ( 2 to 4 m^2 )", "Comparisons as surface area": "\u2248 ( 0.012 \u2248 1/84 ) \u00d7 average surface area of a human lung ( \u2248 70 m^2 )", "Interpretations": "area", "Basic unit dimensions": "[length]^2", "Corresponding quantities": "Radius r of a circle from A = \u03c0r^2:\n | 20 inches\n | 1.7 feet\n | 52 cm (centimeters)"}}
